Dined on the Classic Smashburger. Really scrumptious fresh ingredients on the burger, a lovely view of the golden gate and… timely service. Also really impressive decor. The bar is in a T shape and it’s one piece of wood (assuming it’s a massive redwood or something - it’s pretty cool to look at).

We stayed in the wheelhouse for a change to burger pizza and other fast food.
What to mention above all is that there are plenty of German beers on offer. We didn't taste them all but as expected was very delicious.
The food is also very good, although slightly modified to the Bavarian classics.
One point deduction just for the price of the beer.
The rest is 1a

The Radhaus has a great location and we had a nice after-dinner walk along the waterside. The prices are a little bit pricey, but not outrageous considering the location and San Francisco in general.

The food and beers are authentic, so you can't go wrong. Our waiter was kind and attentive, so a positive experience all the way around.
